anti_claim: This Batch-8 tools-tail fixture accepts exact copied non-secret macro source bodies, bounded public exercises, and stable negative-case codes only. It does not run GodMode, mutate repositories, call providers, export private lab artifacts, claim oracle truth, authorize publication, or approve release.

allowed_public_inputs: public mechanism ids and source-module ids
public negative-case ids and stable error codes
exact copied non-secret macro source modules
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe composite organ that imports Batch-8 tools-tail primitives as exact copied macro source bodies plus public exercises.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader inspect and rerun deterministic tools-tail mechanics without confusing source-open executable evidence with live private runtime, bridge, or mutation authority.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Fixture-only receipts, prose-only claims, GodMode run-missing, live repository mutation, or provider dispatch that does not copy source bodies, execute source behavior, preserve anti-claims, and block private/live-state export.
failure_modes: mechanism count drifts from the four Batch-8 tools-tail targets
source module count drifts from four without manifest and test updates
copied source module digest does not match macro source digest
copied source module lacks required anchors
runtime exercises stop executing source behavior and become receipt-only checks
receipts include copied body text, raw operator transcripts, private lab artifacts, provider/browser state, credentials, or private runtime state

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly four Batch-8 tools-tail mechanism rows
require exactly four copied macro source modules
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors for every copied source module
execute real copied source bodies against public synthetic payloads
require stable negative-case codes for all four mechanisms
keep GodMode run-missing, provider dispatch, live Oracle execution, repository mutation, source mutation, publication, and release authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts may expose refs, digests, anchors, counts, verdicts, and omission receipts but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 8 tools-tail primitives capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 8 tools-tail primitives capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch8_tools_tail_primitives_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: This Batch-8 tools-tail fixture accepts exact copied non-secret macro source bodies, bounded public exercises, and stable negative-case codes only. It does not run GodMode, mutate repositories, call providers, export private lab artifacts, claim oracle truth, authorize publication, or approve release.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, and public_private_boundary.
